  1. Trier /

Park

Moselle Promenade

Innenstadt (Old Town) · Free admission

The Moselle Promenade links the old fishing quarter of Zurlauben with the Roman Bridge. It's a walking strip with a farmers' market, the docks of the passenger boat fleet, and a row of riverside restaurants. On summer evenings it's the most relaxed address in Trier.

Themes

Moselle ActivitiesViews & Hiking

Practical info

District
Innenstadt (Old Town)
Admission
Free admission
Coordinates
49.7593, 6.6261

Experiences by GetYourGuide

Boat trips on the Mosel

Mosel cruises and boat tours along the vineyards set off right from the promenade.

More in Innenstadt (Old Town)

Antike
UNESCO

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Porta Nigra (the Black Gate)

The Black Gate, Trier's landmark and the best-preserved Roman city gate north of the Alps.

From 6 €
Kirche
UNESCO

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Trier Cathedral (Dom St. Peter)

Germany's oldest bishop's church. Home to the Holy Robe, the cathedral treasury, and Romanesque mass right on the Hauptmarkt (the main market square).

Free admission
Kirche
UNESCO

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Liebfrauenkirche (Church of Our Lady)

One of the oldest Gothic churches in Germany, right next to the cathedral.

Free admission

Trier, älteste Stadt Deutschlands. UNESCO-Welterbe, Mosel-Wein, römisches Erbe - Sehenswürdigkeiten, Hotels, Reise-Guides auf einem Portal.
